title: TerracareIdentity
description: Canonical schema for oriana_identity in localStorage — shared across Oriana, Terracare_Messenger, and Pollen Wallet

email.description: Optional recovery email. Stored on-device only. Never transmitted. Governed by Australian Privacy Act 1988.

monthlyReportOptIn.description: User has opted in to receive monthly sovereign ledger report by email

tokenId.description: Sovereign NFT token ID — this IS the identity. Format: NFT_[base36timestamp]_[random]

nftImage.description: Base64 data URL of the user's NFT avatar image

nftColour.description: Hex colour of the user's NFT card border/glow

registeredAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when identity was registered

registeredAtStr.description: Human-readable registration timestamp in Australian Eastern Time

ledgerEntry.description: The ledger entry number of the identity registration event
